title: Password Reset
description: User forgot their password and cannot login
resolution: Reset password via Settings > Security > Reset Password

title: VPN Not Connecting
description: User cannot connect to company VPN from home
resolution: Reinstalled Cisco AnyConnect and reconfigured server URL

title: Laptop Screen Broken
description: Employee laptop screen cracked after fall

title: Cannot Access Jira
description: New employee cannot login to Jira
resolution: Created Jira account and sent credentials via email

title: Slow Internet
description: Office internet very slow affecting work
resolution: Reset network switches on floor 3 fixed the issue

title: Email Not Working
resolution: Reconfigured Outlook email settings and cleared cache

title: MFA Not Working
description: Authenticator app not generating correct codes

title: Data Backup
resolution: Restored files from last night backup

title: Printer Not Working
description: Office printer not connecting to laptop
resolution: Updated printer drivers and reconnected via IT portal
